name: @surgee/pi-flow
description: Pi extension for checked plans, live reports, completion acceptance, and quality checks.
author: Suge8

scripts.check: biome check . && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test: node tests/agent-progress-smoke.mjs && node tests/monitor-overlay-smoke.mjs && node tests/language-smoke.mjs && node tests/plan-smoke.mjs && node tests/scheduler.smoke.mjs && node tests/prewalk-smoke.mjs && node tests/prewalk-flow-eval-smoke.mjs && node tests/context-evidence-smoke.mjs && node tests/context-evidence-evaluation-smoke.mjs && node tests/goal-review-smoke.mjs && node tests/review-smoke.mjs && node tests/activity-frame-smoke.mjs && node tests/status-smoke.mjs && node tests/report-server-smoke.mjs && node tests/result-card-smoke.mjs && node tests/openai-fast-smoke.mjs && node tests/model-roles-smoke.mjs && node tests/report-curve-smoke.mjs && node tests/flow-smoke.mjs && node tests/package-smoke.mjs && node tests/footer-smoke.mjs && node tests/copy-lint-smoke.mjs
